text.title: Vision Basics — Output Contract
text.summary: JSON shape returned by extract(). A Pydantic-validatable ImageResult: description, text_content (nullable), confidence (high/low), provider/model/cache_key metadata.

list.item: Anthropic Claude: 5 MB per image (post-base64 decoded); enforce pre-encode.
OpenAI GPT-4o: 20 MB per image; 4 images per request soft limit.
Google Gemini: 20 MB per image; up to 16 images per request.
text_content — extracted text or null; do NOT pad with "no text" string.
confidence — "high" requires ≥ 90% of fields fully visible; "low" otherwise.
cache_key — sha256 of image_bytes + task_prompt + provider + model.

antipattern.description: confidence "high" while text_content contains placeholder ("see image", "as shown").
antipattern.reason: Placeholder text means the VLM did not actually extract; confidence cannot be high.
Prompt-leak / refusal pattern; not a useful extraction. Re-prompt with stricter instruction.
Cache lookups will silently miss; integrity check fails downstream.

example.code:
{ "status": "ok", "description": "An invoice from Acme Co dated 2026-04-15 with three line items totaling $1,247.50.", "text_content": "Acme Co
Invoice #4421
Date: 2026-04-15
Total: $1,247.50", "confidence": "high", "provider": "anthropic", "model": "claude-sonnet-4-5", "cache_key": "9f4a7c3e8d2b1a5f6e9c0d3b2a1f4e8d7c9b6a5d4e3c2b1a0f9e8d7c6b5a4f3e", "cached": false, "image_count": 1, "retries": 0 }

example.note: Invalid: boilerplate description, placeholder text_content with confidence=high, cache_key not sha256.

list.item: description >= 10 characters and does not match boilerplate template.
text_content is null OR a real extracted string (no placeholders).
retries <= 2; status="error" if retry budget exhausted.
